name: Projectile Motion: Physics Lab
description: Explore the trajectory of a projectile under gravity. The position at any time $t$ is given by $x(t) = v_0 \cos(\theta)t$ and $y(t) = v_0 \sin(\theta)t - \frac{1}{2}gt^2$. This simulation calculates the range, peak height, and flight time dynamically.
renderingCode: class ScienceSimulation { constructor(container, initialInputs) { this.container = container; this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); this.container.appendChild(this.canvas); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); window.addEventListener('resize', () => this.resize()); this.resize(); } resize() { this.canvas.width = this.container.clientWidth; this.canvas.height = this.container.clientHeight; } getSteps(inputs) { const rad = inputs.angle * Math.PI / 180; const v0x = inputs.velocity * Math.cos(rad); const v0y = inputs.velocity * Math.sin(rad); const tTotal = (2 * v0y) / inputs.gravity; const range = v0x * tTotal; const peak = (v0y * v0y) / (2 * inputs.gravity); return [{ title: "Initial Setup", description: "Launch velocity is $v_0 = " + inputs.velocity + "$ m/s at $" + inputs.angle + "^\circ$" }, { title: "Calculations", description: "The projectile reaches a peak of $" + peak.toFixed(2) + "$ m and lands at $" + range.toFixed(2) + "$ m." }]; } render(inputs, stepIndex) { const { ctx, canvas } = this; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); const rad = inputs.angle * Math.PI / 180; const v0x = inputs.velocity * Math.cos(rad); const v0y = inputs.velocity * Math.sin(rad); const tTotal = (2 * v0y) / inputs.gravity; const scale = Math.min(canvas.width / (v0x * tTotal + 50), (canvas.height - 50) / ((v0y * v0y) / (2 * inputs.gravity) + 20)); const originX = 50; const originY = canvas.height - 50; ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(originX, originY); for (let t = 0; t <= tTotal; t += 0.1) { const x = v0x * t; const y = (v0y * t - 0.5 * inputs.gravity * t * t); ctx.lineTo(originX + x * scale, originY - y * scale); } ctx.stroke(); if (stepIndex >= 1) { ctx.fillStyle = 'white'; ctx.font = '14px Arial'; ctx.fillText("Max Height", originX + (v0x * tTotal/2) * scale, originY - ((v0y * v0y) / (2 * inputs.gravity)) * scale - 10); } } }
